name: Scary Shadow Spot - Bitter Glass
short_description: Scary Shadow Spot: Bitter Glass. Without memory, John Doe wanders the desert until he finds refuge in a haunted saloon. The ghosts of the past demand justice, and every clue brings him closer to an unsettling truth. Are you ready to uncover the secret of the Bitter Glass?
detailed_description:
John Doe, a man with no memory, wanders for days through the desert, on the verge of survival. When all seems lost, he spots a remote saloon in the distance: the Bitter Glass. In search of water and shelter, John steps inside… only to find himself trapped in a place that seems alive and haunted by the souls of the dead. The ghosts inhabiting the saloon are members of the gang, the Demons of the Apocalypse, and they ask John to fulfill their last wishes to finally find peace. But a deeper mystery looms: who is John Doe? And why won’t these souls let him go?

Deadly Puzzles

Uncover the hidden secrets of the Bitter Glass by solving cleverly designed puzzles. Each puzzle serves as a key to better understand John Doe’s past and his connection to the ghosts.

Mental Health

Every paranormal encounter challenges John’s sanity. Use whiskey to lower his anxiety level, but beware: drinking too much leads to drunkenness, and the only way to sober up is by vomiting. A delicate balance between sanity and clarity is essential to survive.

Vengeful Spirits

John encounters the members of the "Demons of the Apocalypse," each with unfinished business. Can he fulfill their requests, or will their thirst for revenge be too strong?

Sinister Atmosphere

From the unsettling shadows of the saloon to the desert dunes, every corner of Lonely Plain hides secrets and dangers that sustain a constant sense of threat.

Macabre Music and Sounds

The soundtrack and sound effects will fully immerse you in the spectral Wild West of the Bitter Glass, amplifying horror and tension.

Revelations and Twists

A mystery that slowly unfolds through terrifying encounters and chilling confessions. Each ghost has a story to tell, and every tale brings John closer to a harrowing truth.

Letters and Clues

Find and interpret cryptic letters left by those who were trapped here before you. Each message is a piece of the puzzle that helps uncover the secrets of the saloon and its past.

Captivating Graphics

Detailed environments and realistic lighting make the world of the Bitter Glass both terrifying and immersive, drawing players into a nightmare set in the Wild West.

Constant Tension

Every moment is filled with palpable tension, with jumpscares and sudden appearances keeping players on the edge of their seats.

Scary Shadow Spot: Bitter Glass is the second chapter of the horror series inspired by The Twilight Zone. With a gripping story and puzzles that will test the mind, this episode takes players on a descent into the inferno of their own past.
